contraindications.warning: CRITICAL: NSAIDs like Ibuprofen can elevate blood pressure and reduce the effectiveness of hypertension medications.

instructions.details: Take with food or milk to prevent stomach bleeding.

contraindications.warning: CRITICAL ALLERGY ALERT: You have a documented allergy to Penicillin. Amoxicillin is a Penicillin-class antibiotic.

instructions.foodRequirement: Can be taken with or without food

name: LEVOTHYROXINE

interactions.warning: MODERATE: Levothyroxine may alter blood glucose control. Monitor your diabetes closely.

instructions.details: Administer on an empty stomach, 30-60 minutes before breakfast.

vitalsWarning: May elevate heart rate if dosage is incorrect.

name: PSEUDOEPHEDRINE

contraindications.warning: CRITICAL: Decongestants like Pseudoephedrine constrict blood vessels and can cause a dangerous spike in high blood pressure.

instructions.foodRequirement: Can be taken with or without food
instructions.details: Do not take near bedtime as it may cause insomnia.

vitalsWarning: WARNING: Known to increase heart rate and blood pressure.

instructions.details: Take 30-60 minutes before a meal, preferably in the morning.

contraindications.warning: CRITICAL: High doses of Paracetamol can cause severe liver damage.

instructions.foodRequirement: Can be taken with or without food
instructions.details: Do not exceed 4000mg per day to avoid liver toxicity.
